creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Fri May  2 00:48:17 2014
New Revision: 352769
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352769
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352769/

Log:
  - Allow install lite version
  
  PR:		189211
  Submitted by:	Zsolt Udvari <udvzsolt@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/databases/adminer/Makefile
  head/databases/adminer/distinfo
  head/databases/adminer/pkg-plist

Modified: head/databases/adminer/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/adminer/Makefile	Thu May  1 21:48:33 2014	(r352768)
+++ head/databases/adminer/Makefile	Fri May  2 00:48:17 2014	(r352769)
@@ -3,8 +3,13 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	adminer
 PORTVERSION=	4.1.0
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	databases www
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/Adminer/Adminer%20${PORTVERSION}
+DISTFILES=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX} \
+			${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}.php ${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-en.php \
+			${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-mysql.php ${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-mysql-en.php
+EXTRACT_ONLY= ${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	wen@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Full-featured database management tool written in PHP
@@ -13,11 +18,46 @@ LICENSE=	APACHE20
 
 USES=		zip
 NO_BUILD=	yes
-USE_PHP=	mssql mysql odbc pgsql session pdo_sqlite
+USE_PHP=	mysql session
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 
+OPTIONS_SINGLE=	VERSION
+OPTIONS_SINGLE_VERSION= LITE FULL
+
+OPTIONS_GROUP= LT
+OPTIONS_GROUP_LT= ONLY_MYSQL NLS
+
+LITE_DESC=	Lite version (only a simple index.php)
+FULL_DESC=	Full version (adminer and editor)
+ONLY_MYSQL_DESC=	Only MySQL support - ONLY IN LITE VERSION
+NLS_DESC=	Native Language Support - ONLY IN LITE VERSION
+
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=FULL
+OPTIONS_SUB=yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MFULL}
+USE_PHP+=mssql odbc pgsql pdo_sqlite
+.else
+ADMINER_FILE=${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MONLY_MYSQL}
+POSTFIX_MYSQL=-mysql
+.endif
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MNLS}
+POSTFIX_NLS=-en
+.endif
+POSTFIX=${POSTFIX_MYSQL}${POSTFIX_NLS}
+.endif
+
 do-install:
 	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}${WWWDIR}
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MFULL}
+		@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}${WWWDIR}
+.else
+		${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${WWWDIR}/${PORTNAME}
+		${CP} ${DISTDIR}/${ADMINER_FILE}${POSTFIX}.php ${STAGEDIR}${WWWDIR}/${PORTNAME}/index.php
+.endif
 	@${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${STAGEDIR}${WWWDIR}
 	@${CHMOD} -R 755 ${STAGEDIR}${WWWDIR}
 	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${STAGEDIR}${WWWDIR}' \
@@ -25,7 +65,4 @@ do-install:
 	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHMOD} -R 755 ${STAGEDIR}${WWWDIR}' \
 		>> ${TMPPLIST}
 
-#post-install:
-#	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
-
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================

+SIZE (adminer-4.1.0.php) = 387867
+SHA256 (adminer-4.1.0-en.php) = 0a52f457b71673e9f58e168547bb3b6d26c9bc2c1cd0c8302654102be892713c
+SIZE (adminer-4.1.0-en.php) = 280402
+SHA256 (adminer-4.1.0-mysql.php) = 9235c7aaf5b9a46131b2a7f8e3a9bc88a4236886b718da7b19ce2e23162bde89

+SIZE (adminer-4.1.0-mysql-en.php) = 191036
